name: CMSIS-DAP
description: CMSIS-DAP downloader component using pyOCD for ARM Cortex-M flashing.

actions.name: probe
actions.description: Probe the target MCU and gather info via CMSIS-DAP

actions.name: info
actions.description: Show CMSIS-DAP component status and metadata

actions.name: flash
actions.description: Flash a firmware file to MCU using CMSIS-DAP

actions.name: verify
actions.description: Verify the flashed firmware via CMSIS-DAP

actions.name: reset
actions.description: Reset the MCU after flashing or manually

actions.name: strip
actions.description: Strip debug information from an ELF file
